LanguageData.MustBeOnFleshVeinsOrFlesh: Must be on flesh or flesh veins.
LanguageData.CannotDesignateOnFleshVeinsOrFlesh: Cannot designate on existing flesh or flesh veins.
LanguageData.CellOccupiedByBuilding: Cell is occupied by a blocking building.
LanguageData.TerrainCannotSupport: This terrain cannot support fleshmass growth.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassWallPlan_Desc: Designate areas for fleshmass walls to grow.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassFloorPlan_Desc: Designate areas for fleshmass floors to grow. Cost: 10 hemogel per cell.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassAbsorbPlan_Desc: Designate cells where fleshmass should be absorbed.
LanguageData.FB_MarkSelfForAbsorption_Desc: Automatically marks this structure with a fleshmass absorb plan so the colony can consume it through the normal absorption workflow.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassFloorRemovePlan_Desc: Designate cells where fleshmass terrain (Flesh / FleshVeins) should be removed.
LanguageData.EmergenceWarningText: The ground trembles as something pushes up from below. A flesh burrow is emerging nearby.
LanguageData.FB_UndercaveHeartStabilized: A new colony heart has taken root in the undercave. The collapse has stopped, and the colony is stable again.
LanguageData.FB_UndercaveCollapseWarning: The nerve core is gone. The undercave is collapsing. Leave through the exit, or grow a new colony heart here to stabilize it.
LanguageData.PitGateSettling: The pit gate is still settling.
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback_DefaultCaptureDesc: Seal a humanlike pawn inside the cocoonback.
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback_CaptiveMissing: That captive is no longer stored inside.
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback_SealFailed: Could not seal that pawn inside the cocoon chamber.
LanguageData.FB_GroupTooMany: The brain cannot coordinate more fleshbeast groups.
LanguageData.FB_GroupNoUnassigned: No unassigned fleshbeasts are available for this group.
LanguageData.FB_GroupNoAvailableMembers: No selected group members are currently available on this map.
LanguageData.FB_GroupAssignedReturn: Assigned {0} fleshbeasts from {1} to return to the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_GroupDefendTooltip: Defend a point or escort a friendly pawn
LanguageData.FB_GroupAttackTooltip: Mark attack targets for the group. Click a target or drag a rectangle, oval, or line over multiple pawns; right-click or Escape finishes selection.
LanguageData.FB_GroupReturnTooltip: Return selected group to the colony heart
LanguageData.FB_GroupNoAvailable: No available fleshbeasts for this group.
LanguageData.FB_GroupPawnTooltip: {0} Click to add or remove from the selected group.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponCannotEquip: Bonded living weapon cannot be equipped.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponOwnerUnavailable: The bonded wielder must be alive and present on the map.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponMissing: The bonded living weapon is no longer available.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponNotBondedCreature: This creature is not a bonded living weapon.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponBondedToAnother: This living weapon is bonded to another wielder.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponCannotUseRanged: This pawn cannot use ranged living weapons.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponCannotUseRangedNow: This pawn cannot use ranged living weapons right now.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponMustBeLoose: The bonded living weapon must be loose on the same map, not stored in inventory or equipped.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponCannotMove: The bonded living weapon cannot move right now.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponNoLinks: No bonded living weapons are linked.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponNoLoose: No bonded living weapons are currently loose on this map.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponSummonDesc: Call this bonded living weapon if it is already loose on the current map. It will rush to {0} and equip itself as a primary weapon. If another primary weapon is equipped, it will be dropped first.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponDuplicateType: A bonded living weapon of this type already exists.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponLimit: Only four different living weapon types can be bonded at once.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponGridTooltip: Click a bonded living weapon icon to summon and equip it.
LanguageData.FB_Nerveclot_DefaultDesc: Activate the neural field around the nerveclot.
LanguageData.FB_ScrapmeldAbsorb_Desc: Order Scrapmeld to absorb a specific mechanoid corpse.
LanguageData.FB_ScrapmeldAbsorb_Invalid: Scrapmeld cannot absorb this mechanoid corpse.
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld_MustStudy: This mechanoid must be studied before its weapon can be copied.
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld_UnstableFrame: This mechanoid frame is too unstable to support its weapon.
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld_NoCopyableWeapon: This mechanoid has no copyable weapon.
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld_FrameCollapses: A stored mechanoid frame collapses into slag.
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld_StorageFull: Cannot store mechanoid corpse: storage is full.
LanguageData.FB_Scrapmeld_FrameDegraded: This mechanoid frame is fully degraded.
LanguageData.FB_DenseWeaver_CorpseNotFresh: The corpse is not fresh enough to be transformed.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_NoSample: No valid implant or prosthetic selected.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_ItemNotSample: That item cannot be stored as an implant or prosthetic.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_CannotReachSample: Graftmaw cannot reach that implant or prosthetic.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_BadPatient: Graftmaw only implants into colony pawns and prisoners.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_ImplantMissing: That implant is no longer stored.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_GraftMissing: That prosthetic is no longer stored.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_BadExtractTarget: Graftmaw only extracts from player colonists, prisoners, or immobilized enemies.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_NoExtractPart: That target has no valid outside body parts to extract.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_ResolvePartFailed: Could not resolve that body part.
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom_SlotBoundDesc: Neural slot {0}. Bound to {1}. Left-click to select the controlled pawn. Right-click to release the thrall.
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom_SlotReadyDesc: Neural slot {0}. Ready to seize a hostile humanlike target. Click to choose a target for this slot.
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom_AlreadyBound: That mind is already bound to another controller.
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom_SlotOccupied: Neural slot {0} is already occupied by {1}.
LanguageData.FB_OnlyHumanlikeCorpses: Only humanlike corpses can be used.
LanguageData.FB_SpawnedCocoonNoComp: Spawned cocoon has no cocoon comp.
LanguageData.FB_MustBeOnFleshGround: Must be located on ground covered with flesh.
LanguageData.FB_GroupNoValidPawns: No valid fleshbeasts in the selected group can follow this order.
LanguageData.FB_TransmitHemogelNowDesc: Manually triggers hemogel transmission to targets.
LanguageData.FB_DevBreakCocoonDesc: Immediately break the cocoon and release the pawn inside.
LanguageData.FB_NoValidCocoonCell: No valid cell to form a cocoon nearby.
LanguageData.FB_OnlyOnePerMap: Only one "{0}" can be created on this map by this ability.
LanguageData.FB_NoPawnKindForSpawning: No pawn kind specified for spawning!
LanguageData.FB_SynapseCoreNeuralOverheatBarTooltip: Current pawn's neural overheat before the next brain burn: {0}/{1}. Outside the synapse core, it dissipates over one day.
LanguageData.FB_ReleasePawnDesc: Release the pawn stored inside the container.
LanguageData.FB_AutoReleaseDesc: Toggle automatic release of minions when tasks are available.
LanguageData.FB_AutoReleaseInDaysHours: Auto release in: {0} d {1} h {2} min
LanguageData.FB_CorpseSpoiledViableTissue: The corpse is spoiled and cannot provide viable tissue.
LanguageData.FB_ChangeSporeTypeDesc: Change the type of spores emitted.
LanguageData.FB_RespawnOriginalPawnDesc: Respawn the original pawn from the stored data.
LanguageData.FB_ParasiteLivingTargetOnly: Parasite can only be implanted into a living target.
LanguageData.FB_TargetNoIntactTorso: Target has no intact torso for implantation.
LanguageData.FB_CasterNoIntactFinger: Caster has no intact finger to sacrifice.
LanguageData.FB_SpawnCreatureDesc: Spawn a creature from the available list.
LanguageData.FB_ReplacementCreatureSpawned: Replacement creature spawned instead of resurrection.
LanguageData.FB_BioHumanoidsOnly: Bio is available only for humanoids.
LanguageData.FB_FleshGrowHereDesc: Mark cells where flesh growth is allowed.
LanguageData.FB_ClearFleshGrowDesc: Remove cells from the flesh growth zone.
LanguageData.FB_SunFlowerNoHemogel: The sun flower lacks hemogel network power.
LanguageData.FB_SelectHeldDesc: Selects the pawn currently held inside.
LanguageData.FB_FragmentationManualSplitDesc: Voluntarily rupture into shardlings. The fragments will flee, regroup, and rebuild the original body if enough of them survive.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDivision_Unstable: Flesh is still too unstable. Division is not possible right now.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDivision_HumanlikeOnly: Only humanlike pawns can use flesh division.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDivision_NoSpawnCell: No free cell nearby for flesh division.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDivision_RitualInterrupted: The flesh division rite for {PAWN_nameDef} was interrupted.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDivision_RitualInProgress: {PAWN_nameDef} is already being prepared for flesh division.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDivision_RitualFailedFingerspike: The rite went wrong. One half of {PAWN_nameDef} twisted into a loyal fingerspike.
LanguageData.FB_FleshDivision_RitualPositionInvalid: Flesh division needs enough open space around the pawn for the ritual and for both halves to tear free.
LanguageData.FB_DevSpawnNearWallDesc: Force a spawn attempt right now (ignores schedule, still respects max count and allowed walls).
LanguageData.FB_MustTargetLivingFleshStructure: Must target a living flesh structure.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_NoValidPatientOrImplant: No valid patient or implant selected.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_NoCompatibleSurgeryTarget: No compatible surgery target was found.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_NoValidPatientOrGraft: No valid patient or prosthetic selected.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_NoMatchingMissingPart: This patient has no matching missing body part.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelProductionDaylight: Hemogel production: +{0} / {1} per day ({2}% of maximum)
LanguageData.FB_ScleratBroodTooltip: Stores sclerats for labor. If empty, it quietly grows a new brood - about every {0}-{1} days.
LanguageData.FB_Sinewcaller_PreyLureDesc: Toggle autonomous prey luring. When enabled, the sinewcaller waits near the colony heart, then searches the map for a reachable wild animal marked with the Hunt order whenever capture space is available. It ignores unmarked animals. A successful lure makes the prey follow it back to the colony; a failed lure can enrage the animal and force the sinewcaller to retreat.
LanguageData.FB_Sinewcaller_StateSlotsFull: State: colony capture slots are full
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback_CapacityFull: The cocoon chamber is already full.
LanguageData.FB_Cocoonback_NotEnoughHemogel: Not enough hemogel to seal another captive.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite_HostTransferDesc: Select a valid humanlike corpse and transfer this parasite's stored personality into it.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite_OverwriteDesc: Select a valid humanlike corpse and overwrite its original identity with this parasite's stored personality.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite_NoStored: This parasite does not carry a stored personality.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite_InvalidTarget: That corpse cannot accept the parasite.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite_NoReachableTarget: The parasite cannot reach that corpse.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite_EraseWarning: Warning: the target body's current consciousness will be erased.
LanguageData.FB_Nerveclot_FieldDesc: Flood the area around the nerveclot with a burst of neural command. Nearby fleshbeasts are accelerated, reinforced, and pushed to knit wounds faster.
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom_TetherDesc: Left-click: seize a hostile humanlike target with a neural tether. Right-click: toggle automatic capture during combat.
LanguageData.FB_Thrallbloom_NoReadySlots: Neural tether slots are still regenerating.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_HarvestSampleDesc: Target an implant or prosthetic on the ground to absorb it, or target a colony pawn or prisoner to extract and store a body part or implant.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_InstallStoredDesc: Choose a stored implant or graft and direct the graftmaw to implant it into a compatible colony pawn or prisoner.
LanguageData.FB_HeartHemogelReserveProtected: The colony heart must retain its protected reserve of {0} hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshSummonPawnDesc: Force a pawn to approach this organ.
LanguageData.FB_FleshCocoonMutatorDesc: Force a pawn to approach this organ and be sealed in a cocoon, mutating it.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMergeBeastsDesc: Order nearby fleshbeasts to merge into a stronger form. Left-click: select a target pawn. Right-click: toggle auto mode.
LanguageData.FB_FleshFuseBuildingsDesc: Absorb five nearby fleshleaves to evolve into a compact fleshtree.
LanguageData.FB_CreateBodyDesc: Spawn a blank adult human corpse for a parasite to inhabit.
LanguageData.FB_CreateCorpseZoneDesc: Creates a body stockpile zone around this building. Allows humanlike and animal corpses, forbids mechanoid corpses.
LanguageData.FB_BuildingSpawnThingDesc: Click to place {0} near a target. Small checkbox = toggle auto mode.
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator_WaitingFullRegrowth: Regrowing digging plates near a colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator_PlatesDulled: Plates are dulled; returning to a colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_RaiseGraspingTendrilsDesc: Control the colony heart's grasping tendrils. Left-click: choose a hostile or wild creature and raise tendrils near it. Right-click: toggle automatic capture of valid creatures that enter the heart's territory.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Fingerspike_Desc: Creates one fingerspike. Cheap and fast fleshbeast for basic defense.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Trispike_Desc: Creates one trispike. Balanced fleshbeast with stronger offensive output.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Toughspike_Desc: Creates one toughspike. Expensive but durable fleshbeast suited for frontline combat.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_CortexMite_Desc: Creates one cortex mite. Utility fleshbeast that anchors into flesh terrain as a permanent research node.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_BurdenBlob_Desc: Creates one burden blob. Cheap hauling fleshbeast that carries colony resources and refuels itself from the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_CarapaceExcavator_Desc: Creates one carapace excavator. Heavy mining fleshbeast that breaks designated rock and regenerates its plates at the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Scrapmeld_Desc: Creates one scrapmeld. Adaptive fleshbeast that studies absorbed mechanoid shells and temporarily reproduces their weapons.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Sinewcaller_Desc: Creates one sinewcaller. Utility fleshbeast hunter that lures Hunt-marked wild animals back toward available grasping tendrils.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Graftmaw_Desc: Creates one graftmaw. Surgical fleshbeast that stitches wounds, stores implants, and transplants harvested outer body parts on command.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Cocoonback_Desc: Creates one cocoonback. Large capture fleshbeast that can carry prisoners or colonists inside its living cocoon and keep them sustained during transport.
LanguageData.FB_SymbiosisSpawn_Thrallbloom_Desc: Creates one thrallbloom. Advanced floating fleshbeast that enslaves hostile minds through neural tethers and fights through controlled thralls.
LanguageData.FB_FleshRegenNoHemogel: Warning: no hemogel. The structure is deteriorating.
LanguageData.FB_AutoGrowthDesc: Toggle automatic growth inside the flesh growth area. When enabled, the organ spends hemogel to grow flesh floors, organic walls, and constructed roofs where possible.
LanguageData.FB_DenseWeaver_TransformationNotificatio: Your pawn has transformed into a flesh monster.
LanguageData.FB_Sinewcaller_LureResisted: {0} resisted the lure and turns violent.
LanguageData.FB_ShowAcceptanceTendrilsDesc: If disabled, pawns keep the Flesh-colony acceptance hediff and all gameplay effects, but the tendril body overlay is hidden.
LanguageData.FB_PawnOrBodyNull: Pawn or pawn body is null.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelEconomyStorageTooltipHeart: Main hemogel reserve and distribution node of the colony.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelEconomyStorageTooltipAdjustabl: The upper slider sets the target hemogel level. The heart fills this structure up to the marker and draws excess hemogel back above it.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelEconomyStorageTooltipStatic: This structure stores hemogel inside the colony network.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelEconomyFootnote: Automatic heart growth costs are included in the current drain. One-time costs from abilities, manual construction, spawning and emergency effects are not included.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelEconomyNone: No tracked structures on this map.
LanguageData.FB_FirefoamGland_StructureDesc: Bursts in a wide spray of blood that extinguishes nearby fires when flames get too close or the organ is destroyed.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyHeart_Structure_ColonyBrain_Des: Grows a colony brain from a humanlike corpse, unlocking the Flesh Architect construction tab and hemogel construction.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain_Structure_PhotosyntheticF: Grows a daylight organ that turns unroofed sunlight into hemogel for the colony network.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFleshbeastHealingNotFleshbeast: {0} is not part of the fleshbeast colony.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFleshbeastHealingAlreadyHealing: {0} is already in a healing torpor.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFleshbeastHealingInCombat: {0} is in combat and cannot be forced into healing torpor.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFleshbeastHealingDesc: Left-click to choose a friendly fleshbeast with untreated wounds. The colony heart immobilizes it briefly and tends each wound, leaving the injuries to heal naturally.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFleshbeastHealingWrongMap: {0} must be on the same map as the heart.
LanguageData.FB_ManualFleshbeastHealingAutoHint: Right-click toggles auto-healing. When enabled, the heart searches for the nearest wounded friendly fleshbeast within {0} cells standing on colony flesh.
LanguageData.FB_HeartbeatVolumeDesc: Adjusts the volume of living heartbeat sounds from animated flesh structures.
LanguageData.FB_GroupAttackAlreadyPooled: {0} is already in {1}'s attack target pool.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_ChooseMeatDesc: Choose which memorized raw meat this incubator should grow. Selecting meat stops leather growth and resets the current cycle.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_ChooseLeatherDesc: Choose which memorized leather this incubator should grow. Selecting leather stops meat growth and resets the current cycle.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_NoHauler: No available colonist can carry this sample to the incubator.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_DebugCompleteDesc: Instantly completes the current tissue growth cycle.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain_Structure_TissueIncubator: Grows memorized meat and leather from single samples or whole corpses.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_ItemNotSample: Only raw meat, leather, or whole corpses can be used as tissue samples.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_InspectNoSamples: No meat or leather samples memorized.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_CorpseNoProducts: This corpse has no usable meat or leather sample.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_CorpseAlreadyKnown: This corpse's meat and leather are already memorized.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_LearnedCorpseSampleOn: The tissue incubator memorized {0} from the corpse.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_LearnedCorpseSampleBo: The tissue incubator memorized {0} and {1} from the corpse.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_AddSampleDesc: Select one unit of raw meat or leather, or a whole corpse. A colonist will carry it to the incubator, where the sample will be consumed and memorized by this organ.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_SampleAlreadyKnown: {0} is already memorized by this incubator.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubator_StopProductDesc: Stop growing {0} and clear the current growth progress.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain_Structure_CapillaryTrawle: Filters nearby water through vascular nets, generating hemogel from plankton, algae, and organic traces.
LanguageData.FB_CapillaryTrawlerNoWater: No water cells in the capillary net radius.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelBindDesc: Select a world tile within the range provided by the shared hemogel reserve. The maw spends that reserve once to grow a permanent linked tunnel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelViewTargetDesc: Jump to the world tile and remote mouth linked to this flesh tunnel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelAlreadyLinked: This flesh tunnel has already rooted into a destination.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelNoHemogel: Not enough hemogel to grow a tunnel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelNoDestination: The flesh tunnel has no living destination.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelNoSource: The flesh tunnel's source maw has collapsed.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelTargetSameTile: The tunnel is already rooted on this world tile.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelTargetImpassable: The flesh tunnel cannot root into impassable terrain.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelTargetOccupied: The flesh tunnel can only root into a traversable world tile.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelTargetOutOfRange: Target is too distant: {0} / {1} world tiles.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelWorldTargetLabel: Distance: {0} tiles | Hemogel cost: {1} | Digging time: {2} | Current range: {3}
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelBindingStarted: The flesh tunnel begins rooting through {0} world tiles, spending {1} hemogel. Digging time: {2}.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelCollapsed: The flesh tunnel collapses in on itself.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelSettlementLetterText: The flesh tunnel has rooted into {0}, opening a living passage inside the settlement.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelOpening: The flesh tunnel is still breaking through.
LanguageData.FB_GroupTunnelRaidTooltip: Send selected group through a ready flesh tunnel. After crossing, the group will attack hostile targets on the destination map.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalGridTooltip: Issue simple map-wide commands to friendly fleshbeasts.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalDefendDesc: Order every friendly fleshbeast on this map to defend a point or escort a friendly pawn.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalAttackDesc: Select attack targets. Each valid click adds a creature, structure, wall, plant, corpse, or other destroyable object to the attack pool; right-click or Escape finishes selection.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalTunnelDesc: Choose a ready flesh tunnel mouth on this map. All commandable fleshbeasts will enter that exact tunnel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalStopDesc: Clear the marshal's active order and return controlled fleshbeasts to safe idle behavior.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalUnavailable: The flesh marshal cannot command right now.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalNoPawns: No commandable friendly fleshbeasts on this map.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalNoActiveOrder: The flesh marshal has no active order.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalAssignedDefend: Flesh marshal ordered {0} fleshbeasts to defend {1}.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalAssignedEscort: Flesh marshal ordered {0} fleshbeasts to escort {1}.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalAssignedAttack: Flesh marshal ordered {0} fleshbeasts to attack {1}.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalPooledAttack: Flesh marshal added {0} to the attack target pool.
LanguageData.FB_FleshMarshalAttackAlreadyPooled: {0} is already in the flesh marshal's attack target pool.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilAlreadyActive: This pawn is already maintaining a blood tendril.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilInvalidTarget: Bloodlash requires a living non-mechanical flesh target.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilOutOfRange: The target must be within {0} cells.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilNoOrgan: The blood tendril organ is missing or unusable.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilNoLineOfSight: The blood tendril needs line of sight.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilTargetAlreadyLatched: The target is already caught by a blood tendril.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilAlreadyRestored: The caster is already fed and has no blood or hemogen deficit.
LanguageData.FB_ClearFleshNoGrowDesc: Remove cells from the flesh no-growth zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshNoGrowDesc: Mark cells where the colony heart must not grow flesh. Heart-driven floor growth, wall growth, and creeping auto-spread will avoid these cells, and existing flesh terrain there will be stripped away gradually.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_NoExtractImplant: That target has no extractable implant or artificial part.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_DeleteStoredImplantDesc: Destroy this stored implant inside the graftmaw.
LanguageData.FB_Graftmaw_DeleteStoredGraftDesc: Destroy this stored prosthetic inside the graftmaw.
LanguageData.FB_HemogelEconomyStorageTooltipReserveNo: Stores surplus hemogel for the shared colony network and supplies it when demand exceeds current output.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastAttackDesignator_Desc: Click a target or drag a rectangle, oval, or line over non-player pawns to add them to the selected group's attack pool.
LanguageData.FB_GroupNoAttackTargetsInArea: No valid reachable attack targets were selected.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyStomachFuelInspect: Stored mass: {0} / {1}. Stored nutrition: {2}. Hemogel output: {3}/h.
LanguageData.FB_RuinsNerveCore_Text: With the old colony silent, the remaining flesh folds inward around a new nerve core. Some living walls and floors have decayed into rooted fleshmass.
LanguageData.FB_CarapaceExcavator_WaitingHemogelNetwo: Waiting for hemogel network supply near a colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_Ferrimaw_MetalConsumptionDesc: Allow this ferrimaw to eat allowed metal from stockpiles and convert it into bioferrite. If disabled, its hunger pauses.
